features: 𝗖𝗮𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗶𝘁𝘆: The 15-litre capacity of this slimline pedal bin offers ample space for daily waste disposal without taking up too much room. Whether used for general household waste or to separate recyclable materials, it provides an efficient and practical solution for managing rubbish.

description: Product Description Affordable Everyday Living Here at URBN-LIVING we strive to bring customers High Quality Everyday Products at affordable prices. We source the best materials for our products and have them manufacturer with the everyday consumer in mind. High Quality Affordable Simple 15L Slim Plastic Pedal Bin Waste Refuse Rubbish Recycling Can Kitchen Bathroom This slimline pedal bin is the perfect solution for discreet waste disposal in any modern home. With a 15-litre capacity, it provides ample space for everyday rubbish while its narrow profile ensures it fits seamlessly into tight spaces, making it ideal for bathrooms, kitchens, or even utility rooms. The sleek design and choice of three contemporary colours—classic white, understated grey, and warm cappuccino—allow you to effortlessly coordinate with your existing décor. 15 Litre capacity slimline pedal bin Ideal for bathrooms and kitchens Hands-free, pedal-operated opening for hygienic waste disposal. Available in White, Grey, and Cappuccino to complement any décor. Perfect for general waste or recycling in the home. Dimensions: 40cm (H) x 17cm (W) x 22cm (D). 15L Slim Plastic Pedal Bin Designed for convenience and hygiene, this pedal bin features a hands-free operation. Simply press the foot pedal to open the lid, allowing for easy and sanitary disposal of waste. This eliminates the need to touch the bin, reducing the spread of germs and keeping your hands clean. The smooth, easy-to-clean surface of the bin further enhances hygiene, making maintenance a breeze. This thoughtful design makes it a practical choice for busy households seeking a hassle-free waste management solution. Compact Recycling Bin This versatile bin is not only perfect for general household waste but also offers a convenient solution for waste recycling. Its compact size and convenient pedal operation make it easy to separate and dispose of different types of waste, contributing to a more sustainable lifestyle. Whether you're separating plastics, paper, or other recyclable materials, this bin provides a practical and efficient way to manage your household waste responsibly. Bin for Small Spaces Measuring a compact 40cm in height, 17cm in width, and 22cm in depth, this slim pedal bin is designed to fit comfortably in even the most confined spaces. Its streamlined silhouette allows it to tuck neatly beside toilets, under counters, or in narrow gaps between furniture. This space-saving design makes it a practical choice for smaller homes, apartments, or any area where space is at a premium. This bin offers both functionality and style without taking up valuable floor space.
